description: Explicit exceptions to the readwise/no-server-imports-in-client boundary rule (REF-076). Each entry must be reviewed and owned. Entries should be removed when the underlying violation is fixed.

allowlist.reason: Test-only fixture used by tests/import-boundary.test.ts to verify the allowlist mechanism. Not a real source file; the fixture does not exist on disk.
allowlist.removalCondition: Remove when import-boundary allowlist tests are updated to use a different mechanism.
